summary: Mobile scroll testing completed for all inventory tabs on viewport 390x844. Verified that content at the bottom of each tab is NOT hidden by the fixed bottom navigation bar. The pb-28 padding fix is working correctly - all last items have adequate gap (100-170px) before the nav bar. Right-edge content (Aplicar Filtros button, General label) is fully visible without truncation.

test_results.navigation: PASS - Login PIN 10000 > Opciones > Config > Inventario Maestro
test_results.scroll_testing_methodology: Used page.mouse.wheel(0, 300) in loop (25-30 times) to scroll to bottom of each tab

tab_insumos.last_item: SALSA CHIMICHURRI visible with all action buttons (Producir, copy, edit, delete)
tab_insumos.gap_to_nav: 172px - adequate gap before bottom nav bar

tab_recetas.content: HAMBURGUESA recipe with ingredients (SALSA CHIMICHURRI, CARNE, QUESO, PAN) visible
tab_recetas.gap_to_nav: Adequate gap before bottom nav bar

tab_stock.header_buttons: All icon buttons (refresh, alerts, transfer, adjust) visible
tab_stock.last_movement: SALSA CHIMICHURRI venta movement visible at bottom

tab_compras.buttons_visible: Lista, Gráficos, Exportar, Nueva buttons visible
tab_compras.period_filters: Hoy, Ayer, Semana, Mes, Todo all visible
tab_compras.bottom_content: 'No hay órdenes de compra' message visible with gap before nav

tab_valorizacion.table: All items including SALSA CHIMICHURRI visible at bottom

tab_auditoria.header: Auditoría de Insumos with Exportar button visible
tab_auditoria.stats_cards: 3 cards (Total de Cambios, Insumos Afectados, Tipos de Campo) visible
tab_auditoria.filters: All filters stacked vertically and visible
tab_auditoria.bottom_content: 'No hay registros de auditoría' message visible with gap before nav

tab_asistente.header_buttons: Sugerencias, chart icon, Márgenes buttons visible
tab_asistente.filters: Proveedor, Almacén destino, Incluir OK filters visible
tab_asistente.summary_cards: 4 cards (Agotados, Stock Bajo, Sugerencias, Total Estimado) in 2x2 grid
tab_asistente.bottom_content: 'No hay sugerencias de compra' message visible with gap before nav

critical_code_review_comments: pb-28 sm:pb-4 padding fix in InventoryManager.js line 409 is working correctly
All tabs have proper bottom padding to prevent content from being hidden by fixed nav bar
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile scroll testing for inventory tabs completed. All 7 tested tabs (Insumos, Recetas, Stock, Compras, Valorización, Auditoría, Asistente) pass scroll-to-bottom test. The pb-28 padding fix ensures content is not hidden by the fixed bottom navigation bar. Right-edge content (Aplicar Filtros button, General label in Valorización) is fully visible without truncation.
